exam_name: SAP Certified Application Associate — SAP S/4HANA Sales 2023
exam_format: Linear (online proctored or in-person Pearson VUE)

testing_centers.notes: In-person and online proctored via Pearson VUE

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID. Name must match registration exactly.
exam_rules: Closed-book. No notes or reference materials. Online proctored or in-person at Pearson VUE. SAP certifications do not expire once passed (except SuccessFactors and cloud certs which require annual validation).
renewal_options: Most SAP certifications do not expire. SAP SuccessFactors and cloud solution certifications require annual validation via a delta exam or stay current exam.

retake_policy.notes: No official waiting period. Full exam fee ($562) required for retake. Unlimited attempts.

official_study_resources.title: SAP Learning Hub
official_study_resources.notes: Official SAP training and e-learning aligned to certification exams

official_study_resources.title: SAP Certification Hub Practice Tests
official_study_resources.notes: Official practice exams available for purchase through SAP Training

aliases: sap certified application associate sap s 4hana sales 2023
